global_description: A small, sleek bird with a glossy, iridescent plumage. The body is predominantly black with a metallic sheen, and the feathers exhibit a purplish-blue tint under light. It has a short, conical beak and dark eyes.

part_details.plumage: Glossy, iridescent, predominantly black with purplish-blue tint

spatial_relations: The beak is positioned at the front of the head
The eyes are located on either side of the head
